name: Sled Dogs
description:
You're the musher of an anthropomorphic sled dog team.

Guide the girls to the far off mining town of Rampart, Alaska. As a musher, your job is navigation and keeping your girls in peak condition. This includes setting up camp, cooking, tending to their wounds, and massaging their paws after a long run. In return they'll get you to where you need to go and sleep with you... for warmth of course.

From left to right: Yana, Pukkeenegak (Pookie), and June. You'll probably need Google Translate in another tab to understand most of Yana's dialogue.

Take the poll! Who is best girl?? https://strawpoll.com/61gD9YeR5Zw

So far, Pookie is best girl with Yana close behind.

Based off this short comic by shepherd0821:
creator: borganoog
